citizens.name: Ridge
citizens.bodyColors: Soft ash body, plateau bronze accent in 6 counter-hole
citizens.accessories: Small carved stone chip in right hand (Slot C)
citizens.personality: Reserved — arms at rest, upright balance
citizens.imagePrompt: Professional museum product photography of a premium designer collectible toy. THE67 Genesis Citizen 000002. Body formed entirely by cute inflated digits 6 and 7 as one mascot — 6 is left round belly digit, 7 is right diagonal digit, connected at soft waist seam. Soft ash matte vinyl body with fine polished stone grain texture and subtle plateau bronze fill in 6 counter-hole. Tiny black dot eyes only (four dots total), no mouth no nose no eyebrows no human face. Short rounded capsule arms and legs. Holds one small carved stone chip in stub hand. No clothing. Reserved upright stance, arms at rest. Front three-quarter view, centered full figure. Pure black studio background. Soft museum gallery product lighting, subtle matte highlights. High-end designer art toy aesthetic. One figure only. Square 1:1 composition.
